1. Ensure that you have Java 17 or above installed.
2. Down the latest version of `InventoryBro` from [here](http://link.to/duke).
Adds a new item to the list of todo items.
* The `DEADLINE` can be in a natural language format.
`todo n/Write the rest of the User Guide d/next week`
`todo n/Refactor the User Guide to remove passive voice d/13/04/2020`
**Q**: How do I transfer my data to another computer?
* Main entry-point for the java.seedu.inventorybro.InventoryBro application.
System.out.println("How can I help you today, bro?");
* Represents an item with a description and quantity.
* Creates an item with the given description and quantity.
* Returns the item in save file format.
* @return A string formatted for writing to the save file.
* Returns the string of the item's description and quantity.
* @return The string format of the item's description and quantity.
* Manages the list of items, providing operations to add and delete items.
* Creates an item list pre-populated with the given items.
* @param items An existing list of items to manage.

* Removes and returns the item at the given index.
* @param index Zero-based index of the item to delete.
* Returns the item at the given index.
* @param index Zero-based index of the item.
* Returns the number of items in the list.
* Returns true if there are no items in the list.

Parser.parse("transact abc q/10", items);     // non-digit index
